prompt: Ultra-realistic Gen Z-style selfie collage featuring three vertical smartphone flash photos of a young woman with long, softly curled black hair, luminous glass-like skin, subtle rosy cheeks, glossy peach-toned lips, and fresh natural makeup. She wears a vintage blue-gray sleeveless Nirvana top, a silver chain necklace, and black nail polish with detailed nail art. Each selfie captures a different expression: chin resting on hand, playful wink with tongue sticking out, and a warm cheerful smile. Bright phone-flash lighting, authentic social media aesthetic, casual candid vibe, highly detailed and photorealistic.
